info.name: FitCoach Pro API
info.description:
Complete API collection for FitCoach Pro — covers Auth, Coach, Trainee, legacy exercise plans, and **v1 workout-plan builder** (`/v1/...`).

**Base URL:** `http://localhost:8080/api` (matches `server.servlet.context-path=/api`).

**How to use:**
1. Import this collection into Postman.
2. Run **Register Coach** (or **Login Coach**) to get `{{coachToken}}`.
3. Open folder **Workout plans (v1 API)** → run **Setup – save coachId** then **Create plan** → **Add workout day** → **Replace workout exercises** → **Assign plan to trainee** in order (IDs auto-save to collection variables).
4. `{{traineeId}}` defaults to `1` — change after **Get My Trainees** if needed.
5. Set `{{mealId}}` from **Get My Nutrition Plans** (meal `id` strings) when logging meals.
6. Exercise IDs `1` and `2` assume wger seeding created rows; use **Get All Exercises** if not.

body.raw:
{
  "fullName": "John Coach",
  "email": "john.coach@fitcoach.com",
  "password": "password123",
  "specialisation": "Strength & Conditioning",
  "bio": "10+ years helping athletes reach peak performance."
}

request.description: Public endpoint. Registers a new coach and returns a JWT token.
Login with coach credentials. Token is auto-saved to {{coachToken}}.
Login with trainee credentials. Token is auto-saved to {{traineeToken}}.
Public endpoint. Requires a valid invitationToken UUID generated by the coach. Run 'Create Invitation' first to populate {{invitationToken}}.
Returns the authenticated coach's profile. Requires coach JWT.
Updates the authenticated coach's profile. All fields are optional.
Generates a UUID invitation token for the given email. Token is auto-saved to {{invitationToken}} for use in 'Register Trainee'.
Lists all invitations sent by the authenticated coach.
Lists all enrolled trainees who registered via the coach's invitation.
Returns trainee profile plus workout completion history. Uses `{{traineeId}}` (default 1) from **Get My Trainees** if needed.
Returns coach alerts (e.g., trainees that need attention).
Aggregated coach home data: coach profile, trainees list (for needs attention / top performers / sessions), and invitations (for pending invites).
Returns the authenticated trainee's profile. Requires trainee JWT.
Updates the authenticated trainee's profile. All fields are optional.
Returns the profile of the coach who invited this trainee.

Returns the trainee's **most recently created** assigned nutrition plan as a detailed payload: `meals[]` with macros and `ingredients[]` (id + name). Older plans are not listed — use coach **Get My Nutrition Plans** for the full coach-side list. Populate `{{mealId}}` from a meal's `id` when calling **Complete Meal**.
Returns the authenticated trainee's assigned exercise plans.
Aggregated trainee home data for 'Today' card: profile, coach, today workout & nutrition summaries, weekly goals, achievements.
Marks a plan session (workout day) completed for today. Set `{{planSessionId}}` (UUID) from coach **v1 – Add workout day** or your DB.

Logs today's meal for the authenticated trainee. **Body is optional** — omit it or send `{}` for a default full completion.

- `skipMeal: true` — whole meal skipped (response message: "Meal skipped successfully").
- `skippedIngredientIds` — ingredients not eaten.
- `replacedIngredients` — swaps: `originalIngredientId`, `newIngredientId`, optional `newQuantity`.

Set `{{mealId}}` from **Get My Nutrition Plans** (meal `id`).
Example: skip the entire meal for today. Uses `{{mealId}}`.
Example: skipped one catalog ingredient and swapped another. Replace IDs with values from **Get My Nutrition Plans** / **Get All Ingredients**.
Plan id is a **UUID** for v1 plans. Response includes `sessions` (e.g. title "Leg Day", dayOrder) and `exercises` with `sessionTitle` / `sessionId` / `dayOrder` on each line.
Returns `planId`, `planTitle`, `planDescription`, and `sessions[]` with `sessionId`, `title`, `dayOrder`, `exerciseCount` only — no exercise lines. Same assignment check as full plan detail.

item.name: 📈 Progress (Trainee)
item.description: Trainee-only progress endpoints: workout logging (per set), measurements, and progress pictures.

item.name: Complete plan session with logs (per exercise, per set)

request.description: Logs completion for a plan session with per-exercise outcomes. Replace `planSessionExerciseId` with a real UUID from the plan detail response (each exercise line has a sessionExercise id). `outcome` ∈ COMPLETED | SKIPPED | MISSED.
Creates a measurement log entry for the authenticated trainee. `date` must be today or earlier.
Lists all measurement log entries for the authenticated trainee (newest first).
Stores URLs for progress pictures for the authenticated trainee. `date` must be today or earlier.
Lists all progress picture entries for the authenticated trainee (newest first).

item.name: 📈 Progress (Coach)
item.description: Coach-only endpoints to review trainee workout logs and view trainee measurements/pictures.

request.description: Lists trainee workout logs, including per-exercise excuses and set-level outcomes. Uses `{{traineeId}}`.
Adds coach review notes to a specific workout log entry. Set `{{workoutLogId}}` from **Get Trainee Workout Logs**.
Lists all measurements for a trainee (coach access). Uses `{{traineeId}}`.
Lists all progress pictures for a trainee (coach access). Uses `{{traineeId}}`.
Lists all available exercises (seeded from wger open source API).
Lists all available ingredients (seeded from Open Food Facts).

query.description: true = delete all exercises & ingredients first (fails if still referenced by meals/plan lines)

request.description: Downloads English exercises and ingredients from wger and saves them. If tables are empty (e.g. after truncate script), `replace=false` is enough. Use `replace=true` only when catalog has no FK references.
Creates a new nutrition plan. Restricted to Coach role. Can add meals using predefined ingredient IDs or custom calories.
Retrieves the coach's nutrition plans. Restricted to Coach role.
Assigns an existing nutrition plan to one or more trainees.
Creates a new exercise plan for the coach and assigns it to trainees, including per-exercise sets/reps/load/rest.
Retrieves the coach's exercise plans. Restricted to Coach role.
Assigns an existing exercise plan to one or more trainees.

item.name: 📋 Workout plans (v1 API)
item.description: New hierarchical API (`WorkoutPlan` → `PlanSession` → `PlanSessionExercise` → `PlanAssignment`). Requires **ROLE_COACH**. Run in order; tests store `workoutPlanId` and `planSessionId`.

request.description: Calls existing coach profile and saves `data.id` to `{{coachId}}` for **Create plan**.
`POST /api/v1/plans` (full URL with context path: `/api/v1/plans`). `coachId` must match the authenticated coach.
Adds a `PlanSession`. Path uses `{{workoutPlanId}}` from **Create plan**.
Body must be a **raw JSON array**. Replaces all lines for this plan session. Uses `{{planSessionId}}` from **Add workout day**. Adjust `exerciseId` values to match **Get All Exercises**.
Trainee must belong to this coach. Set `{{traineeId}}` (default 1) from **Get My Trainees** if needed. Second assign returns 409 CONFLICT.
